description: Update all 4 pitch files with current numbers, features, and pricing to reflect production-ready state of the app
steps: In pitch/Horrorgeticon_Ops_Pitchdeck.html line 158: Change '52 Crew' to '120+ Crew'

In pitch/Horrorgeticon_Ops_Pitchdeck.html slide 17 (Investition) around line 422: Change '12.800 EUR' market price to '13.300 EUR' and update the descriptive text below about market value to reflect new scope

In pitch/Kostenaufstellung.html: Update market prices in the table - Saison-Lizenz: 4.800->5.000, Einrichtung: 2.400->2.500, Schulung: 1.500->1.800, Generalprobe: stays 1.200, Eventnacht: stays 2.000, Nachbereitung: 900->800. In pitch/Kostenaufstellung.html: Change '300+ automatische Tests' to '307 automatische Tests (241 API + 66 Browser-E2E)' in the 'Im Preis enthalten' box

In pitch/Anschreiben.md: In the Spickzettel section, add demo highlights: Kids Day zeigen, Dokumente zeigen, Timeline zeigen. Expand the WLAN-concern answer to explicitly mention Offline-Modus and Load-Test (150+ gleichzeitige Verbindungen)
In pitch/Anschreiben.md: Update '~12.800 EUR' market reference to '~13.300 EUR'
In pitch/Anschreiben.md: Update '120 Darsteller' reference (already correct from previous update) or add if missing
In pitch/README.md line 25: Change '300+ automatische Tests' to '307 automatische Tests' and update breakdown to '241 API-Checks + 66 Browser-E2E-Checks'
In pitch/README.md line 26: Change '52 Crew . 5 Mazes' to '120+ Crew . 5 Mazes'
In pitch/README.md: Add mention of Load-Test (150+ gleichzeitige Verbindungen) as additional demo feature
acceptance_criteria: All references to '52 Crew' in pitch/ are changed to '120+ Crew'
All test counts show '307' (not 300+ or 172) - with breakdown 241 API + 66 E2E
Module count is '23 Server-Module' everywhere in pitch/
Kostenaufstellung market sum is 13.300 EUR, friendship price stays 3.400 EUR
Market value of platform development shows >100.000 EUR prominently
Load-Test (150+ connections) is mentioned in Kostenaufstellung and README
New features (Kids Day, DND, Timeline, Docs Hub, Export, Offline, Security Hardening) appear in Pitchdeck
Anschreiben references updated numbers and new demo highlights
npm test still passes (241 tests green)
verification: Run npm test and confirm all 241 tests pass
grep -c '172' pitch/* should return 0 (no old test count remaining)
grep '3.400' pitch/Kostenaufstellung.html should still show the friendship price
grep '13.300' pitch/Kostenaufstellung.html should show the new market sum
grep '307' pitch/Kostenaufstellung.html pitch/README.md pitch/Anschreiben.md should show updated test counts
findings: All updates applied successfully. npm test passes (241 tests). The '172' matches in the Pitchdeck HTML are in base64-encoded screenshot images, not text content. The sticky note text (48/52 da) mentioned in the briefing was already updated in a prior task and no longer present. All acceptance criteria verified.
